channel.title: Pages on Kevin McKee
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on Kevin McKee

item.title: About me
item.author: kmckee90@gmail.com (Kevin McKee)
item.description: img { float: right; padding-bottom: 30px; } I have lived in Virginia for my whole life. As of recently, I live in a house out in the mountains with my wife, Linnea, my cat, Hobbes, and our new pup, Thomas (pictured above). Interests Psychology My undergraduate degree is in Psychology but I have not carried out much of my own substantive research. Having come to understand things like artificial neural networks, I am hoping to use them to eventually contribute to the science of cognition and perception.

item.title: Code
item.author: kmckee90@gmail.com (Kevin McKee)
item.description: Stan code Non-Normal Factor Model Structural Ordinal Item Response Theory with a Latent Interaction Neural networks: Binary neural nets in R, part 1: Restricted Boltzmann Machine Binary neural nets in R, part 2: Helmholtz Machine Dynamical Systems Discretization in 3 languages Stochastic Resonance Most coding projects can be found on github. Some are not yet prepared for public consumption, meaning completely lacking in annotations, full of commented out zombie code, and generally messy.

item.title: Lectures
item.author: kmckee90@gmail.com (Kevin McKee)
item.description: iTHRIV Structural Equation Modeling Talk Stochastic Processes in R course VIPBG Research Seminar

item.title: Links
item.author: kmckee90@gmail.com (Kevin McKee)
item.description: Google Scholar page github repositories for various projects OSF page for supplemental materials of published projects Old art website Old blog serving as my notebook for philosophy, math, statistics, and cognitive science study

item.title: Publications
item.author: kmckee90@gmail.com (Kevin McKee)
item.description: Google Scholar page Curriculum Vitae OSF for supplemental materials of published projects McKee, K. L., (2021) Hierarchical Biometrical Genetic Analysis of Dynamics. Behavior Genetics (pending final reviews) Preprint McKee, K. L., Crandell, I. C., Hanlon, A. L. (2020) US County-Level Social Distancing and Policy Impact: A Dynamical Systems Model. Journal of Medical Internet Research https://doi.org/10.2196/23902 McKee, K. L., Russell, M., Mennis, J., Mason, M., & Neale, M. C. (2019). Emotion Regulation Dynamics Predict Substance Use in High-Risk Adolescents.

item.title: Research
item.author: kmckee90@gmail.com (Kevin McKee)
item.description: Job title: Postdoctoral Associate Department of Statistics Center for Biostatistics and Health Data Science Virginia Tech Research Goals Long-term, I would like to contribute to research on how the brain undertakes metacognition and self-reflection. Research on mindfulness, cognitive behavioral therapy, and other self-reflective states of consciousness has shown that metacognition has a large influence on mental health and learning. It should be possible to simulate metacognition and self-reflection from first-principles in artificial neural networks and doing so would allow us to better understand both the higher cognitive capabilities of humans as well as mental illnesses.
